missionBrief.marcusNote: Infrastructure sprint complete. All four operational blockers cleared. The plumbing works. Now we fill the pipes. Primary deliverable: memory architecture document. Secondary: get the dashboard and daily operations humming.

situationAssessment.label: Infrastructure
situationAssessment.text: All systems operational. SOUL.md v3.0.0 deployed. COUNSEL.md v2.1.1 live. Open Brain at 439 thoughts. Gateway online. Telegram two-way. 5 cron jobs running with observability logging.

situationAssessment.label: Memory Architecture
situationAssessment.text: Research phase complete: Mem0 OSS, Letta, MemOS, LangMem evaluated. Mem0 is leading candidate. Design decisions pending: namespace separation, Open Brain sync, RSI consolidation algorithm. Marcus drafting architecture document.

situationAssessment.label: Hermes Evaluation
situationAssessment.text: Installation and assessment underway on Oz Box. Evaluating skill learning loop, memory architecture compatibility, MCP support. Feeds into Marcus's architecture document.

situationAssessment.label: Operational Maturity
situationAssessment.text: Transition from building to operating. Command Center live with data pipeline. Cron observability added. Status snapshots flowing to Open Brain.

dominantThemes: Transition from building to operating — the instrument is built, now we use it.
Memory architecture is the critical design decision — Mem0 namespace separation, sync mechanism, RSI algorithm.
Skill roadmap ranked: memory first, daily utility second, human interface last. Build the brain before the mouth.

priorities.whyNow: Marcus's primary deliverable. Research done. Design decisions needed before Mem0 deployment.

priorities.deliverable: Command Center accuracy and Ask Marcus proxy
priorities.whyNow: Dashboard must reflect current state. Ask Marcus needs serverless proxy (no exposed API key).

priorities.deliverable: Hermes evaluation and Codex OAuth feasibility
priorities.whyNow: Alternative agent and model options feed architecture decisions.

deprioritized: Voice interface (Skill 6) — Deepgram recommended, but infrastructure and memory come first.
Video Funnel, Resume/Bio — personal projects, not Counsel foundation work.
RSI Consolidation (Skill 5) — depends on memory architecture decisions.

seedInsight.title: Build the Brain Before the Mouth
seedInsight.text: Chuck's skill ranking reveals a clear instinct: memory and knowledge flow first (consolidation, cross-model capture, RSI), daily utility second (calendar, research), human interface last (voice). The architecture document is the linchpin. Every skill past #3 depends on it. Ship the document, then the skills sequence unlocks.

successCriteria: Memory architecture document ready for Chuck-Marcus review by Sunday April 5
Command Center dashboard current and accurate with Ask Marcus proxy live
Calendar integrated into morning briefing (Skill 2 confirmed live)

dailyBrief.infrastructureStatus: Gateway: ONLINE. Open Brain: 439 thoughts. All systems green.
openItems: Ask Marcus serverless proxy (OZ-CMD-1) — in progress
Hermes Agent evaluation on Oz Box

projects.next: Deploy Ask Marcus serverless proxy, verify streaming chat

projects.title: Weekly Mission Brief
projects.desc: Sunday workflow: Oz gathers, Marcus synthesizes, docx to Drive, Chuck prints. Pipeline functional.

projects.title: Grand Synthesis Corpus
projects.desc: Curated reference library of essential texts. NotebookLM as platform. Scope defined, awaiting Chuck's first book list.
projects.next: Chuck provides first book list; Counsel sets up NotebookLM structure

projects.title: Knowledge Consolidation Pipeline
projects.desc: OneNote migration, Readwise integration, Recall.ai notes, drive reorganization. Blocked on memory architecture decisions.

projects.desc: Process journal entries into annual summaries. Connected to Obsidian and Open Brain consolidation.
